allow: PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; "Proces $proc ukončen" } else { "Port 3001 je volný" })

PowerShell($pid3002 = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3002 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if \($pid3002\) { taskkill /PID $pid3002 /F; "Ukončen PID $pid3002" } else { "Port 3002 je volný" })
PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { taskkill /PID $_.Id /F }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "Hotovo")
